name: Grilled Lamb Cutlets with Pea-Pod & Basil Pur
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the pea pods until just tender, then pass through a sieve or liquidize them (avoiding too much fiber in the puree).
2. Reheat the purée gently with the butter and cream.
3. Cut the garlic clove in half and rub over the lamb cutlets.
4. Brush the olive oil over the meat and season well with salt and pepper.
5. Grill for a few minutes on each side, to your desired doneness (pink or well done).
6. Roughly chop the basil leaves and stir into the purée off the heat.
7. Season with salt and pepper, then serve with the grilled lamb.
